results.title: India’s first hydrogen train on Jind-Sonipat route to start commercial service on July 19: Ticket price, timing, stops
results.description: India's first hydrogen train will begin regular passenger service tomorrow. Check the ticket price, route, station stops, timings and other key travel details.

results.title: Wordle Answer Today: July 18, 2026 Solution and Hints for NYT Puzzle Number 1,855 Are Finally Revealed
results.description: Wordle #1,855's solution 'BOOTH' puzzled players with its varied meanings, from voting and dining spaces to historical references, highlighting the game's complexity and the importance of strategic guessing.

results.title: Kestra Advisory Services LLC Boosts Holdings in Dimensional Emerging Core Equity Market ETF $DFAE
results.description: Kestra Advisory Services LLC grew its stake in Dimensional Emerging Core Equity Market ETF (NYSEARCA:DFAE – Free Report) by 20.2% in the 1st quarter, according to the company in its most recent filing with the Securities & Exchange Commission.
